See the List Entry Deadlines 2025–2026 Super Early Deadline October 31, 2025 Early Deadline December 12, 2025 Regular Deadline January 23, 2026 Extended Deadline February 6, 2026 Final Deadline February 20, 2026 Your Work, Crystallized. The One Show is where the world's best ideas rise to the top. For over 50 years, the Pencil has stood as one of the most respected honors in advertising, design, and beyond. And at the pinnacle: the Crystal Pencil, awarded only to Best of Discipline winners—peer-to-peer recognition from a jury of over 300 global creative leaders. Winning here is hard. That's why it matters. The One Show represents integrity, bold thinking, and the highest level of creative excellence across the industry. With disciplines spanning the full spectrum of creativity—from timeless formats like Print and Film to cutting-edge categories in Gaming, Creative Use of AI, and the brand-new Creator Content discipline—The One Show continues to evolve alongside the work it honors. 2026 also sees the debut of The One Show Indies, a dedicated competition for independent shops proving you don't need scale to make impact. Winners are celebrated on May 15, 2026, during Creative Week in New York City—a week-long global festival from The One Club for Creativity, the world’s foremost nonprofit supporting and celebrating the creative community. This is your moment. Explore the categories. Enter your boldest work. Claim your place among the world’s best. Creative Use of AI Creator Content Creative Marketer Design & Branding Design in Advertising The One Show Indies Commitment to Integrity Integrity has always been the foundation of The One Show. For over 50 years, we have upheld the principle that true creative excellence must also be authentic, fair, and transparent. In 2026, we renew that commitment with even stronger standards that protect the legacy of the Pencil and the trust of the global creative community. Read more Award Intelligence For the first time, entrants to The One Show can gain meaningful insight into how their work performed in the jury room—through a new AI-powered feedback tool designed to educate, clarify, and elevate future submissions. This optional service transforms the often-mysterious judging process into actionable learning, helping entrants better understand why a piece resonated with judges and how award decisions were made.
